Featured news
Centrifuge and Plume Network Partner to Pioneer Next-Generation RWA Innovation in DeFi
Centrifuge collaborates with Plume Network to integrate Anemoy's Liquid Treasury Fund into Plume's Nest Protocol, offering institutional-grade onchain treasury access.
See all articles
Read more

Explainer

The leading platform for tokenized financial products

Centrifuge’s real-world asset tokenization and fund management platform brings the full power of onchain finance to asset managers and investors.

Launch app
$ 646M
Total Assets Financed
1531
Assets Tokenized
Tokenize any asset
Access RWA investments

Working with

Benefits

Why Centrifuge?

Centrifuge provides the infrastructure and ecosystem to seamlessly tokenize, and manage a diversified group of real-world assets. The Centrifuge technology supports any issuer, asset, or use case with a seamless user experience.

Asset-agnostic platform

Tokenize any asset class with no restrictions, offering flexibility across a wide range of asset types.

Real-time data access

View real-time onchain data, monitor asset performance, and make informed decisions.

Optimized for efficiency and scalability

Scale your operations with robust infrastructure that minimizes cost and maximizes performance.

Asset managers

Tokenize your fund with Centrifuge

Streamline and accelerate the tokenization of assets and management of funds onchain. Benefit from advanced reporting features with fully transparent data in one platform. Centrifuge sets a new standard for transparency, security, and operational excellence.

Flexibility in tokenizing and managing your funds onchain

Access to fully transparent, real-time, onchain data

Log trades, issue assets, manage your portfolio

Learn more
Learn more
Investors

Access tokenized assets

Get access to a diverse spectrum of tokenized assets across the credit yield curve. Track all transactions and asset performance real-time, onchain with full transparency and verifiability. Centrifuge prioritizes supporting your investment strategies and outcomes.

Learn more

Fully transparent data on asset and fund performance

Access from your chain using your currency of choice

View performance and transactions in real-time

Learn more

Industry contributors

Proudly advancing the tokenized real-world asset ecosystem

Why the Trump administration is taking aim at stablecoins to jumpstart its pro-crypto push

Eli Cohen, General Counsel for Centrifuge, sees bipartisan support for stablecoin legislation as the White House prioritizes regulation.

Onchain real-world assets gain traction amid Bitcoin market uncertainty

Bhaji Illuminati, Centrifuge CMO, highlights RWAs as stable, yield-bearing assets amid Bitcoin stagnation and growing tokenization interest.

2/6/2025

US Crypto Regulations vs. MiCA Rules: Are Global Standards Underway?

Centrifuge team stresses the need for global crypto regulation to prevent arbitrage and support innovation.
Read more

Blockchain technology has a long-held promise to overhaul the plumbing of the world’s financial services. To this end, BlockTower is excited to support the Centrifuge team as they democratize access to and generate efficiencies in the securitization industry; we believe these strategic partnerships are essential to usher in the future of finance.

Matthew Goetz
CEO/Founder, BlockTower Capital

This integration not only advances DeFi but it also brings many benefits to the MakerDAO ecosystem. By diversifying the collateral backing DAI and adding non-crypto related assets, it increases the DAI safety and makes it extremely stable. This move will also help MakerDAO meet the increasing demand of DAI by tapping in a multi trillion-dollar asset class.

Sébastien Derivaux
MakerDAO

The Centrifuge team is a leader in real-world asset tokenization, taking a deeply thoughtful approach to design decisions around legal, regulatory, and smart contract architecture. We believe we're reaching an inflection point in institutional adoption and are excited to double down with the Centrifuge team.

Ben Forman
Founder and Managing Partner, ParaFi Capital

We firmly believe that Centrifuge is poised to claim significant portions of this market. Having pioneered their category, the team demonstrates unwavering resilience through many years of commitment across several market cycles. Their expertise in navigating the intricacies of integrating real-world assets into decentralized finance is unparalleled.

Felix Machart
Partner, Greenfield Capital

The RWA Market is a much needed building block not only for protocols such as Aave, but across DeFi as a whole. Knocking down barriers of entry and making DeFi accessible to all is part of the Aave Companies’ vision, and we are excited to be fulfilling this through the collateralization of real-world assets, made possible by Centrifuge.

Stani Kulechev
Founder, Aave

Ready to launch your fund onchain?

Centrifuge is the platform for tokenized real-world assets onchain.
